name: Git Config Manager
description: Standardizes git configuration for devcontainer users from feature options or host environment variables

userName.description: Git user.name. Falls back to host env var GIT_USER_NAME if empty.

userEmail.description: Git user.email. Falls back to host env var GIT_USER_EMAIL if empty.

gpgSigningKey.description: GPG signing key for commit signing. Falls back to host env var GIT_SIGNING_KEY.

defaultBranch.description: Default branch name for new repositories

safeDirectories.description: Comma-separated list of paths to add to safe.directory. Use * for all.
